sys_script_include.description: This Script Include defines the ItsmaUtils utility class for working with request types. It centralizes field lookups with a generalized getFieldValue method that includes robust error handling (logging errors for missing sys_ids, missing records, or exceptions, and warnings for empty fields). Specialized helpers (getAssignmentGroup, getDefaultPriority) call into this method to return the fulfillment group or default priority with safe fallback values. The design improves consistency, maintainability, and debugging visibility while ensuring workflows continue with defaults when data is missing.
sys_script_include.name: ItsmaUtils
